description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a combination of brown synthetic leather and mesh materials, with a white rubber sole. The shoe has a prominent 'MM' branding on the heel collar area and a small orange tag near the back. The laces are a light beige color, threaded through metal eyelets, and the tongue displays a circular logo patch. The upper part of the shoe is reinforced with textured overlays at the toe and heel for durability. The midsole is thick and white, providing cushioning and contrast to the darker upper. The overall design is modern and urban, suitable for casual streetwear.
description: A brown high-top sneaker with 'MM' branding, beige laces, and a white rubber sole, featuring synthetic leather and mesh materials.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the heel, 'MM' branding, orange tag, and mesh heel panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'MM' branding, beige laces, and the shoe's profile.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the lacing system, tongue logo, and rounded toe cap.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible branding and side panel details.
attribute_logo: circular logo patch on tongue, orange rectangular tag on heel
